block1.title: "Quality First, Win-Win Together"
block1.description: AMC actively pursues quality, obtains various professional certifications, and cooperates with customer requirements to actively introduce other professional certifications, in order to meet customer needs in product quality, production efficiency and customer service, and create new win-win opportunities.

optical.title: Optical Material Cutting
optical.desc: Provide cutting services for various sizes of optical films and OCA

material.title: Functional Materials
material.desc: Optical/structural adhesives, shading-reflective tapes, removable adhesives, protective films, foam tapes

cutting.title: Cutting Services
cutting.desc: Provide customized cutting services for optical and industrial films, slitting, rewinding, lamination, die-cutting

block3.intro: AMC is based on the improvement and development of core technical capabilities, market demand-oriented, combined with waste reduction, environmental protection, customization, cost advantages and other strategies, to develop related process technologies and key materials, improve and enhance process technical capabilities, and achieve diversified application development goals.

tech1.title: Optical Functional Materials
tech1.desc: UV adhesive, optical adhesive, optical structural resin, self-assembly materials

tech2.title: Adhesive Application Materials
tech2.desc: Ultra-high adhesion, micro adhesion, high-low adhesion combination, special adhesion

tech3.title: Cutting Processing Technology
tech3.desc: CNC, wafer cutting, FT special cutting, precision die cutting, lamination, slitting, roll cutting, multi-layer film composite processing
